title: eryngium cymosum
intro: Eryngium cymosum, also known as Sea Holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family, characterized by its thistle-like flowers and silvery-green leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eryngium cymosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe skin irritations, among others. In herbal preparations, Eryngium cymosum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
